decision.summary: No new action: the book is flat, but the remaining daily board is late and weak, and the weekly frontier still offers no clean edge.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean and the account has no open positions. The remaining same-day markets in this snapshot are still the April 25 board, which is technically open until 04:00 UTC, but they offer poor late-session quality: 77k dip is only around 10.5% and 78k reach around 20%, both well below the preferred 45-84% entry band and too weak to justify a fresh trade with only a few hours left. On the weekly side, 80k reach is only around 7% and 72k dip around 1.75%, so the weekly frontier is also too far and too cheap to be the clearest expression of the current thesis. Binance is neutral short-term, with price sitting near the middle of the recent intraday range and no decisive continuation signal. The disciplined decision is NO_ACTION and to wait for a fresher April 26 board or a clearer weekly setup.
